top_signals.title: Doorsteps by President von der Leyen with President Zelenskyy ahead of the EUCO meeting of 18-19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: European Commission Statement Brussels, 18 Jun 2026 I also want to join those who congratulate Ukraine for opening the first cluster. This is a big step forward. Congratulations, and you deserve it because you ha...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asset Purchase Facility: Gilt Sales – Market Notice 19 June 2026
top_signals.summary: This Market Notice sets out the schedule for sales in Q3 2026 of gilts held in the Asset Purchase Facility (APF) for monetary policy purposes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Senate eyes Hegseth travel cuts without probes into Iran school bombing, boat strikes
top_signals.summary: Senate lawmakers added a provision in the NDAA that would restrict Hegseth's travel expenses until the department releases certain operational information.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: what the Scope Systems cyber attack reveals about mining’s digital fragility
top_signals.summary: The recent ransomware attack targeting Scope Systems’ ERP software stack disrupted operations at dozens of mostly Australian mining companies.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Letta: Europe Needs To Be United In Front Of Trump
top_signals.summary: Former Italian Prime Minister and IE School of Politics, Economics & Global Affairs Dean Enrico Letta, underscores the urgency of European unity in the face of Donald Trump’s presidency. Letta argues that only a cohesive and determined Europe can safeguard its interests and values in a shifting global landscape. He speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
